meaning: n.可能力,(用复数)潜能.潜力.可能性
examples: All of these are useful breeds whose potentiality has not been realized.
It is dead; it is just a potentiality.
These caves have large exploration potentiality.
All of these different fronts of our relationship have produced very substantial outcomes but they also show that we remain current in our potentiality.
On the other side, there is also a diffused feeling of uneasiness, if not of fear, of the great potentiality that it can offer.
